title:
Senior Java Software Engineer
Senior Java Software Engineer
description:
About the job
Sydney CBD (Hybrid, 2 to 3 days in office)
$140,000 to $150,000 plus super

We are hiring a hands-on Senior Java Software Engineer to join a platform team delivering complex, enterprise-scale applications. This role involves building features and systems end-to-end across both frontend and backend, with a focus on direct technical delivery and platform scalability.

What you will do
Design, build and maintain Java applications across frontend and backend
Deliver complex features and modules from design through to production
Write clean, testable code and contribute to long-term maintainability
Collaborate with product and delivery teams to align solutions with business needs
Mentor developers and contribute to technical design discussions

What we are looking for
Minimum five years of professional Java development experience
Strong, hands-on Java coding with proven delivery in large applications
Experience across both frontend and backend
Database knowledge (SQL Server, PostgreSQL, Oracle)
Familiarity with build tools, version control and CI/CD pipelines
Stable career history showing commitment and growth

What you will get
$140,000 to $150,000 plus super
Hybrid work model with flexible hours
Annual salary review and structured professional development
Inclusive culture with regular team events and additional leave benefits
Wellness support including an employee assistance program

If you are a Senior Java Engineer who enjoys building complex systems and delivering features that make a real impact, we want to hear from you.
